category_sources: source_facts.description says LAME is a high quality MPEG Audio Layer III MP3 encoder.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lame and official homepage uses LAME project branding.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official LAME project site and best official documentation entry point.
repo_sources: Official LAME download page states development source is maintained in SVN hosted on SourceForge.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies MP3/MPEG Audio Layer III encoding.
source_facts.executables lists the lame encoder command.
